name: sbom rejects an unknown output format with a usage error
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . --format bogus 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'unknown format' e.txt && echo h15-rejects-format 1>&2
